title: Sherry-Caramelized Salmon Hash
description: A savory and juicy Canadian dish featuring salmon hash with a touch of sherry caramelization, perfect for brunch and also suitable as a paleo-friendly meal.
instructions: Season salmon fillets with salt and pepper. If using paleo eggs, lightly beat them in a small bowl.
Dust sliced onions and minced garlic with unsweetened almond flour.
In a skillet over medium heat, sauté the seasoned onion and garlic until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Fold in salmon fillets and cook for another 2-3 minutes on each side, adding a splash of sherry if desired.
If you prefer poaching or grilling your salmon, do so now according to paleo guidelines. Brush with more sherry if preferred.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs like parsley or dill for extra freshness.
